title: MVS Telemetry Hits
description: Aggregated node-hit counts for a grammar, tallied by the instrumented parser over a corpus. The usage fraction of a node is hits[node_id] / total_samples.

grammar.description: Must match the AST 'grammar' these hits were measured against.

total_samples.description: Number of inputs fed through the parser — the denominator for every usage fraction.

hits.description: Traversal count per node id. A node absent from this map has an implied count of 0.

provenance.description: Optional, additive record of the corpus this artifact was built from (T6.7).

manifest.description: Path/URI of the corpus manifest this artifact was built from.

crawl_ids.description: Common Crawl crawl ids behind the corpus (e.g. CC-MAIN-2024-10).

dump_dates.description: Wikipedia (or other) dump dates behind the corpus (YYYYMMDD).

seed.description: Deterministic sampling seed that produced the corpus.

sample_size.description: Number of URIs/samples in the corpus.
